moves.name: Standing Medium Kick
moves.notes: 強制立ち効果
moves.notesEn: Forces the opponent into a standing position

moves.name: Standing Heavy Kick
moves.notes: 強制立ち効果空振り時硬直1F増加
moves.notesEn: Forces the opponent into a standing position1 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

moves.name: Crouching Medium Punch
moves.nameJa: しゃがみ中P（膝折り豪掌）
moves.notes: 空振り時硬直2F増加
moves.notesEn: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

moves.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
moves.notes: パニッシュカウンター時ダウン時間増加、ハードノックダウン
moves.notesEn: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

moves.name: Jumping Light Kick
moves.notes: めくり性能
moves.notesEn: Has cross-up attack properties

moves.name: Jumping Medium Punch
moves.notes: 空中ヒット時吹き飛びダウン
moves.notesEn: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

moves.name: Jumping Medium Kick
moves.notes: めくり性能
moves.notesEn: Has cross-up attack properties

moves.name: Jumping Heavy Punch
moves.notes: 空中カウンター/パニッシュカウンター時叩きつけダウン
moves.notesEn: Forces a slam knockdown on counter or Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponent

moves.name: Skull Splitter
moves.notes: ※初段が空振り時のみ2段目が中段判定
moves.notesEn: *Second attack becomes an overhead only if the first attack whiffs

moves.name: Resso Snap Kick
moves.notes: 空振り時硬直4F増加ガード時硬直3F増加
moves.notesEn: 4 frames of recovery added when the attack misses3 frame of recovery added when blocked

moves.name: L Gou Hadoken(Lv1)
moves.notes: 25F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv2が発動49F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv3が発動
moves.notesEn: Hold and release the button for 25 frames or more to activate Level 2Hold and release the button for 49 frames or more to activate Level 3

moves.name: M Gou Hadoken(Lv1)
moves.notes: 25F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv2が発動49F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv3が発動
moves.notesEn: Hold and release the button for 25 frames or more to activate Level 2Hold and release the button for 49 frames or more to activate Level 3

moves.name: H Gou Hadoken(Lv1)
moves.notes: 25F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv2が発動49F以上ボタンを押して離すとLv3が発動
moves.notesEn: Hold and release the button for 25 frames or more to activate Level 2Hold and release the button for 49 frames or more to activate Level 3

moves.name: OD Gou Hadoken(Charged)
moves.nameJa: OD 豪波動拳（ホールド）
moves.notes: 25F以上ホールドすると性能変化
moves.notesEn: Hold down the button for over 25 frames to change its properties

moves.name: L Zanku Hadoken
moves.notes: 空弾属性に対して無敵の技に当たらない
moves.notesEn: Does not hit against moves invincible to mid-air projectiles

moves.name: M Zanku Hadoken
moves.notes: 空弾属性に対して無敵の技に当たらない
moves.notesEn: Does not hit against moves invincible to mid-air projectiles

moves.name: H Zanku Hadoken
moves.notes: 空弾属性に対して無敵の技に当たらない
moves.notesEn: Does not hit against moves invincible to mid-air projectiles

moves.name: OD Zanku Hadoken
moves.notes: 空弾属性に対して無敵の技に当たらない
moves.notesEn: Does not hit against moves invincible to mid-air projectiles

moves.name: L Gou Shoryuken
moves.notes: 1-14F　空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵8-35F　空中判定
moves.notesEn: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 14Considered airborne from frames 8 - 35

moves.name: M Gou Shoryuken
moves.notes: 1-9F　空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵9-45F　空中判定
moves.notesEn: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9Considered airborne from frames 9 - 45

moves.name: H Gou Shoryuken
moves.notes: 1-9F　空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵10-52F　空中判定
moves.notesEn: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 9Considered airborne from frames 7 - 52

moves.name: OD Gou Shoryuken
moves.notes: 1-8F　完全無敵8-53F　空中判定
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 8.Considered airborne from frames 8 - 53.

moves.name: L Tatsumaki Zanku-kyaku
moves.notes: 5-27F　空中判定空振り時硬直6F増加
moves.notesEn: Considered airborne from frames 5 - 276 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

moves.name: M Tatsumaki Zanku-kyaku
moves.notes: 5-38F　空中判定
moves.notesEn: Considered airborne from frames 5 - 38

moves.name: H Tatsumaki Zanku-kyaku
moves.notes: 8-72F　空中判定
moves.notesEn: Considered airborne from frames 8 - 72

moves.name: OD Tatsumaki Zanku-kyaku
moves.notes: 5-44F　空中判定
moves.notesEn: Considered airborne from frames 5 - 44

moves.name: L Adamant Flame(1)
moves.notes: 19-22F ヒット時専用技に派生可
moves.notesEn: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 19 - 22

moves.name: M Adamant Flame(1)
moves.notes: 23-26F ヒット時専用技に派生可空振り時硬直3F増加パニッシュカウンター時+10F
moves.notesEn: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 23 - 263 frames of recovery added when the attack missesAdds +10 frames of advantage on a Punish Counter

moves.name: H Adamant Flame(1)
moves.notes: 27-30F ヒット時専用技に派生可空振り時硬直2F増加パニッシュカウンター時+12F
moves.notesEn: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 27 - 302 frames of recovery added when the attack missesAdds +12 frames of advantage on a Punish Counter

moves.name: OD Adamant Flame(1)
moves.notes: 22-25F ヒット時専用技に派生可パニッシュカウンター時に膝崩れダウンに+39F
moves.notesEn: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 22 - 25Produces a crumple stun for 39 frames when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

moves.name: L Demon Raid
moves.notes: 18-40Fまで、百鬼豪斬、百鬼潜影を除いた各種派生技でキャンセル可能7F以降、空中判定
moves.notesEn: Can go into any transition attack except for Demon Low Slash and Demon Swoop between frames 18 - 40Considered airborne after frame 7

moves.name: M Demon Raid
moves.notes: 18-40Fまで、百鬼豪斬、百鬼潜影を除いた各種派生技でキャンセル可能7F以降、空中判定
moves.notesEn: Can go into any transition attack except for Demon Low Slash and Demon Swoop between frames 18 - 40Considered airborne after frame 7

moves.name: H Demon Raid
moves.notes: 18-40Fまで、百鬼豪斬、百鬼潜影を除いた各種派生技でキャンセル可能7F以降、空中判定
moves.notesEn: Can go into any transition attack except for Demon Low Slash and Demon Swoop between frames 18 - 40Considered airborne after frame 7

moves.name: OD Demon Raid
moves.notes: 16-40Fまで、百鬼豪斬、百鬼潜影を除いた各種派生技でキャンセル可能16-40Fまで、天魔豪斬空でキャンセル可能7F以降、空中判定
moves.notesEn: Can go into any transition attack except for Demon Low Slash and Demon Swoop between frames 16 - 40Can be canceled into Tenma Gozanku between frames 16 - 40Considered airborne after frame 7

moves.name: Demon Guillotine
moves.notes: ガードさせた高度によって硬直差が変化
moves.notesEn: Recovery changes depending strength of the attack blocked

moves.name: Demon Blade Kick
moves.notes: ※OD百鬼襲から発動時、始動補正20%ヒット・ガードさせた高度によって硬直差が変化空振り時硬直5F増加
moves.notesEn: Initial scaling of 20% when performed from Overdrive Demon RaidRecovery changes depending on the height of the attack when it hits or is blocked5 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

moves.name: Demon Swoop
moves.notes: 相手を飛び越えて着地時硬直5F増加
moves.notesEn: 5 frames added to landing recovery when jumping over the opponent

moves.name: Oboro Throw
moves.notes: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化・ダメージ2900・SAゲージ4000増加
moves.notesEn: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2900 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000

moves.name: SA1 Messatsu Gohado
moves.notes: 1-14F　打撃・投げに対して無敵最低保障ダメージ30％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない
moves.notesEn: Invincible to strikes and projectiles from frames 1 - 14Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

moves.name: SA1 Tenma Gozanku
moves.notes: 最低保障ダメージ30％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない空弾属性に対して無敵の技に当たらない
moves.notesEn: Minimum guaranteed damage is 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterDoes not hit against moves invincible to mid-air projectiles

moves.name: SA2 Empyrean's End
moves.notes: 1-11F　完全無敵壁到達時に壁やられ最低保障ダメージ40％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 11.Produces a wall splat if the opponent reaches the wallMinimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

moves.name: SA3 Sip of Calamity
moves.notes: 1-11F　完全無敵最低保障ダメージ50％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない※必殺技キャンセル時のみ適用
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 11.Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

moves.name: CA Sip of Calamity
moves.notes: 1-11F　完全無敵最低保障ダメージ50％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない※必殺技キャンセル時のみ適用
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frame 1 to frame 11.Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

moves.name: CA Shun Goku Satsu
moves.notes: 1F　完全無敵6-27F　飛び道具無敵最低保障ダメージ50％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない※必殺技キャンセル時のみ適用
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible on frame 1Invincible to projectiles from frames 6 - 27Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

moves.name: Goshoha
moves.notes: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化・ダメージ2040・SAゲージ4000増加・ハードノックダウン
moves.notesEn: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

moves.name: Shuretto
moves.notes: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化・ダメージ2040・SAゲージ4000増加・ハードノックダウン
moves.notesEn: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

moves.name: Backward Dash
moves.notes: 1-15F 投げ無敵
moves.notesEn: Invincible to throws from frame 1 to frame 15.

moves.name: Drive Impact: Oni Goroshi
moves.nameJa: ドライブインパクト（鬼殺し）
moves.notes: 1-27F　 アーマー判定（2回）ヒットバックでステージ端に到達すると壁やられが発生パニッシュカウンター、もしくはアーマー成立後にヒットで以下の性能変化・地上ヒット膝崩れ・空中ヒット吹き飛び時間増加・SAゲージ3000増加
moves.notesEn: Super Armor for 2 attacks from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallOn Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Forces a spinning knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

moves.name: Drive Reversal (while blocking): Souha Double Palm
moves.nameJa: [ガード時]ドライブリバーサル（双破）
moves.notes: リカバリアブルダメージ1-22F 完全無敵ヒット時硬直5F増加
moves.notesEn: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

moves.name: Drive Reversal (while recovering): Souha Double Palm
moves.nameJa: [起き上がり時]ドライブリバーサル（双破）
moves.notes: リカバリアブルダメージ1-20F 完全無敵ヒット時硬直5F増加
moves.notesEn: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

moves.name: Drive Parry
moves.notes: ※1 動作の4F目からドライブラッシュでキャンセル可※2 ボタンホールドでパリィの持続を延長可硬直部分はガードのみ可動作中常に被パニッシュカウンター判定
moves.notesEn: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution

moves.name: Perfect Parry (strike)
moves.notes: 相手の攻撃に対応した方向入力を行った状態でパリィを入力し、入力したフレーム、もしくはその次のフレームで攻撃を受けると成立する（上段/中段攻撃に対して←方向、下段攻撃に対しては↙方向)方向が正しくなかった場合は通常のドライブパリィとなり、追加でDゲージが3000増加する硬直終了から5Fの間完全無敵 （パリィを継続した場合は無敵にならない）ジャストパリィを取られた側はキャンセルが出来なくなり、動作終了まで強制パニッシュカウンター
moves.notesEn: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

moves.name: Perfect Parry (projectile)
moves.nameJa: ジャストパリィ（飛び道具）
moves.notes: パリィを入力したフレーム、もしくはその次のフレームで攻撃を受けると成立する暗転演出が入らないジャストパリィを取られた側はキャンセルが出来なくなり、動作終了まで強制パニッシュカウンター
moves.notesEn: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

moves.name: Parry Drive Rush
moves.nameJa: パリィドライブラッシュ
moves.notes: 暗転10F※動作9F目から攻撃行動にキャンセル可　24F目からパリィ以外の行動でキャンセル可
moves.notesEn: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

moves.name: Cancel Drive Rush
moves.nameJa: キャンセルドライブラッシュ
moves.notes: 暗転9F※動作10F目から攻撃行動にキャンセル可　25F目からパリィ以外の行動でキャンセル可
moves.notesEn: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
